title: Resurrection Aggregate Telemetry v1
description: Tier-1 aggregation schema summarizing resurrectionQuality behavior per seed/event.

version.description: Schema version for this aggregate record.

recordedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this aggregate was computed.

eventId.description: Event identifier this aggregate summarizes, if applicable.

resurrectionKind.description: Resurrection kind (echo, replay, escalation, etc.) shared by the aggregated runs.

counters.description: Attempt and gate counters over all runs in this group.

attempts.description: Total number of resurrection attempts considered.

allowed.description: Number of attempts allowed by the resurrection gate.

blocked.description: Number of attempts blocked by the resurrection gate.

metricsRealized.description: Average realized metric deltas and levels for this resurrection group.

avgUECdelta.description: Average change in UEC across runs (after - before).

avgEMDdelta.description: Average change in EMD across runs.

avgSTCIdelta.description: Average change in STCI across runs.

avgCDLdelta.description: Average change in CDL across runs.

safety.description: Counts of safety-related violations observed for this group.

detOverflows.description: Number of runs where DET exceeded its configured cap.

cdlOverflows.description: Number of runs where CDL exceeded its configured cap.

arrTooLow.description: Number of runs where ARR fell below its target floor.

rwfHint.description: Reliability hint synthesized from scores and safety behavior.

rwfScore.description: Reliability weight factor for this resurrection (0–1).

telemetryWindow.description: Optional window metadata describing which runs were included.

from.description: Inclusive start of the aggregation window.

to.description: Inclusive end of the aggregation window.

runCount.description: Number of resurrection-run records actually ingested.

origin.description: Optional linkage back to design-time contracts or bundles.

originId.description: Design origin identifier (bundle, archetype, or contract).

schemaRef.description: Canonical schemaRef of the originating contract, if known.

extras.description: Extension point for lab or project-specific fields. Tier-1 consumers must ignore.
